address: Wau, Western Bahr el Ghazal, South Sudan
pastorQuote: We are a Christ-centered church family committed to worship, discipleship, unity, and serving our community with love. Whether you are visiting for the first time or looking for a spiritual home, you are welcome here.
missionStatement: To worship God in spirit and in truth, make disciples of all people, and bring hope and transformation to our community in South Sudan.
verseText: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.
